mapper.select: SELECT id, article_id, user_id, content, like_count, create_time, update_time FROM comment WHERE article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY like_count DESC, create_time DESC
SELECT id, comment_id, user_id, reply_to_user_id, content, like_count, status, create_time, update_time FROM comment_reply WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} ORDER BY like_count DESC, create_time DESC
